summary: Closed out ADR 0266 from the latest `origin/main` release context (`0.177.90`) while preserving the original exact-main replay source `020c5f5ad` from repository version `0.177.88`: the build-server validation path, supporting OpenBao runtime converge, mirrored worker checkout refresh, and direct Windmill post-merge fallback all remain green, establishing platform version `0.130.60` as the first platform version where this ADR is true.

verification.observed: `git fetch origin main` refreshed this worktree to the newer published mainline commit `f965aa3101fa2cd2260a8e6fda165f366365ed80` (`2026-03-30T01:45:22+03:00`, repository version `0.177.90`). ADR 0266 itself first became true from exact-main replay source commit `020c5f5ad21d21864861e7b3aa21570474ff8988`; the code-carrying replay tree was commit `42fcf4c04306967ae1a6e896738dd3e1f669ae6e`, and `020c5f5ad21d21864861e7b3aa21570474ff8988` only refreshed the evidence bundle before that earlier publication.

verification.check: Integrated ADR 0266 automation and validation sweep
verification.observed: `./scripts/validate_repo.sh generated-docs data-models policy workstream-surfaces agent-standards` passed; `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema pytest -q tests/test_canonical_truth.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_policy_checks.py tests/test_post_merge_gate.py tests/test_release_manager.py tests/test_remote_exec.py tests/test_validation_gate.py tests/test_validation_gate_windmill.py tests/test_validation_runner_contracts.py tests/test_windmill_operator_admin_app.py tests/test_windmill_playbook.py tests/test_windmill_integration_wrappers.py tests/test_stage_smoke_suites.py tests/test_integration_suite.py tests/test_declared_live_attestation.py tests/test_artifact_cache_runtime_role.py` returned `88 passed in 129.31s`, and `make syntax-check-openbao` passed from the synchronized mainline worktree.

`make check-build-server` passed and verified immutable snapshot upload for the exact-main tree on `ops@10.10.10.30`. `make remote-validate` then passed at `2026-03-29T22:07:09.413886+00:00` on runner `build-server-validation` with selected lanes `repository-structure-and-schema`, `generated-artifact-and-canonical-truth`, and `service-syntax-and-unit`; `make pre-push-gate` passed at `2026-03-29T22:10:48.423912+00:00` on the same runner with all 20 blocking checks green; and `make gate-status` reported both exact-main build-server runs from the committed tree.

`make converge-openbao` replay `2026-03-29-adr-0266-mainline-converge-openbao-rerun-2` finished with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=140 changed=9 failed=0` and `postgres-lv3 : ok=43 changed=0 failed=0`, re-verifying the OpenBao-backed runtime surfaces that ADR 0266 now depends on.

verification.check: Worker mirror and post-merge fallback verification
verification.observed: `docker-runtime-lv3` keeps `/srv/platform_server` as a mirrored runtime checkout rather than a git repository, so the exact-main worker proof synced `config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py` directly into that mirror, refreshed `python3 scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --write`, `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, and `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write`, then reran the live worker wrappers. `python3 /srv/platform_server/config/windmill/scripts/gate-status.py --repo-path /srv/platform_server` returned `status: ok`, and `python3 /srv/platform_server/config/windmill/scripts/post-merge-gate.py --repo-path /srv/platform_server` returned `status: ok` while writing `post-merge-last-run.json` with `status=passed`, `source=windmill-post-merge-local-fallback`, `executed_at=2026-03-29T22:24:37.498783+00:00`, and both bounded fallback commands returning `0`.

notes: This receipt supersedes the earlier branch-local receipt `2026-03-29-adr-0266-validation-runner-capability-contracts-live-apply` as the canonical source for the ADR 0266 first-implemented repository version `0.177.88` and first live platform version `0.130.60`.

Latest `origin/main` has since advanced to repository version `0.177.90`; this closeout merges the ADR 0266 live-apply truth onto that newer release line without changing the original exact-main replay source commit or first-implemented version metadata.

Because `/srv/platform_server` on the worker is a mirrored runtime checkout instead of a git repository, the authoritative worker replay uses direct mirrored-script verification plus generated-artifact refreshes instead of `git pull` on the VM.
No further merge-to-main action remains for ADR 0266 after this receipt closeout.
